name: kopo-formatter
description: Visual Studio Code extension to format Cobol files

kopo-formatter.indentationSpaces.description: Fallback indentation spaces when no editor tab size is configured. Normally editor.tabSize is used automatically.

kopo-formatter.addEmptyLineAfterExit.description: Insert a blank line after an EXIT statement

kopo-formatter.addEmptyLineAfterDivision.description: Insert a blank line after each Division ends, before the next Division header

kopo-formatter.addEmptyLineAfterSection.description: Insert a blank line after each Section ends, before the next Section header

kopo-formatter.omitContinuationLines.description: Replace the '-' continuation indicator in column 7 with a space, so wrapped lines look like normal indented lines

kopo-formatter.evaluateIndentWhen.description: Indent WHEN clauses inside an EVALUATE block

kopo-formatter.alignPicClauses.description: Align PIC and VALUE clauses in the Data Division to a consistent column

kopo-formatter.sourceFormat.description: COBOL source format: auto-detect, fixed-form, or free-form

enumDescriptions: Transform all COBOL reserved words to UPPERCASE
Transform all COBOL reserved words to lowercase
kopo-formatter.keywordCase.description: Normalize the case of COBOL reserved words

kopo-formatter.normalizeWhitespace.description: Collapse multiple consecutive spaces into one within procedure division statements

kopo-formatter.wrapLongLines.description: Wrap lines that exceed column 72 using fixed-form continuation markers (only applies to fixed-form source)

kopo-formatter.uppercaseProcedureNames.description: Convert section and paragraph names to uppercase

kopo-formatter.alignDelimitedBy.description: Align data names and DELIMITED BY clauses in STRING/UNSTRING statements so they start at consistent columns

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run bundle
scripts.package: npm run build && vsce package --out build
